findings.title: Document should have one main landmark
findings.actual_results:
Ensure the document has a main landmark

URL: https://example.com

Document does not have a main landmark
- "Example Domain This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing" in Page section
findings.recommendation:
Provide exactly one main landmark to help screen-reader users identify primary page content.
- Review affected elements and apply semantic HTML updates required by this rule.
- Retest after fixes and verify no violations remain.

all.message: Document does not have a main landmark

findings.title: All page content should be contained by landmarks
findings.wcag_name: All page content should be contained by landmarks
findings.actual_results:
Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks

URL: https://example.com

Some page content is not contained by landmarks
- "Example Domain This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing" in "Example Domain"
findings.incorrect_code:
Example Domain

This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission. Avoid use in operations.

Learn more
findings.recommendation:
Ensure all significant page content is inside semantic landmarks.
- Wrap major content in semantic landmarks such as <main>, <header>, and <footer>.
- Ensure only one primary <main> landmark is present.
